purpose: Wire normalized San Jacinto road geometry into the shared Gridly runtime roadway pipeline for validation-only road-name, corridor, alert, awareness, and location resolution consumption.

roadResolverIntegration.loader: ROADWAY_SEGMENTS_URL derives from gridlyGetActiveCountyRuntimeSources().roadSource and loadRoadwayDataset fetches the active county road GeoJSON when roads are available.
roadResolverIntegration.resolverPath: collectNearbyRoadCandidates consumes roadwaySegmentFeatures populated by loadRoadwayDataset; road-name, nearby pair, reference road, and corridor helpers share that dataset.

alertIntegration.consumerModel: buildGridlyAlertCardConsumerModel remains on shared road/location helper paths; no San Jacinto-specific alert wording was added.

awarenessIntegration.consumerModel: buildGridlyLightweightActiveAwareness remains on shared road-context and top-awareness generation paths; no county-specific awareness wording was added.

notes: San Jacinto remains validation-only and production-blocked pending V651 reauthorization.
